summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Real-World Applications
summary_sections.content_html:
Real-World Applications

Example: Which example demonstrates the practical relevance of Photons and Quantum Mechanics?

This is a real-world application of Photons and Quantum Mechanics.

summary_sections.title: Special Topics
summary_sections.content_html:
Important Concepts

Which term is described by: "Light ejects electrons only if hf ≥ φ (threshold frequency); KE_max = hf - φ; explained by photon model, not wave model"

This description refers to "Photoelectric effect".

Which term is described by: "The minimum energy needed to eject an electron from a material's surface; material-dependent; determines threshold frequency f₀ = φ/h"

This description refers to "Work function (φ)".
